scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold" --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" "cd backend && node server.js" "cd frontend && npx vite"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold" --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" "cd backend && node server.js" "cd frontend && npx vite"
